title: WIP: Fix release v1.14
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind failing-test 

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Bring the `release-v1.14` branch up to more modern CI design, similar to master where VM's have packages pre-installed.

#### How to verify it

CI testing will pass

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #2416

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
@TomSweeneyRedHat feel free to close your #2416, I'll take this off your plate.  Though IIRC, @rhatdan gave an "okay" to backport crun support for testing here (I have no idea what that involves).  Any hints would be appreciated.

(Reminder: We believe tests are failing because back in v1.14 days, all of CI was based on using runc.  We've since moved on to exclusively testing crun).
I'm unlikely to be able to get to this.  Re-open if priority.
